summary: FPV drones struck a civilian parking area in Kherson’s Korabelnyi district during the declared ceasefire, with damage and casualties still being assessed. Near Huliaipole, Russian FPV drones killed a Ukrainian evacuation team for wounded personnel around 17:30, despite the ceasefire. In Kostiantynivka, Ukrainian soldiers of the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with video showing one soldier holding a drone detector at 0:11. Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions were hit by FPV drones, and another Russian soldier who pretended to surrender was later killed by FPV drones after attempting to flee.
